subcodes.first_line: O people of Baha! Be as the cloud that from you may be showered… Ponder God in your heart… I came not to proclaim that which ye already possess…
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @justice and wrath of God, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @fairmindedness; personal justice [insaf], @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
